title: euchiton collinus
intro: Euchiton collinus, also known as the mountain daisy, is a small shrub native to New Zealand, characterized by its white or pink flowers and silvery-green foliage. The medicinal properties of Euchiton collinus include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it effective in treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support the immune system. Euchiton collinus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and has been traditionally used by the indigenous Maori people for its medicinal and spiritual properties.
